name: repomind
description: Gives Claude Code grounded codebase context via the RepoMind CLI.
author: RepoMind Maintainers

tools.name: repomind_ask
tools.description: Ask a natural language question about the indexed repository.
tools.when_to_use: User asks how something works, where something is, or what calls/uses a specific component.

tools.name: repomind_explain
tools.description: Explain a specific source file: purpose, key symbols, and execution flow.
tools.when_to_use: User asks about a file, or you need file context before editing or reviewing it.

tools.name: repomind_overview
tools.description: High-level repository overview: key modules, important files, project summary.
tools.when_to_use: User asks about project structure or you are starting work on an unfamiliar repo.

tools.name: repomind_index
tools.description: Build or incrementally update the semantic index for a repository.
tools.when_to_use: Repo has not been indexed yet, or files have changed since the last index.

tools.name: repomind_doctor
tools.description: Diagnose RepoMind setup: index status, embeddings, API key configuration.
tools.when_to_use: Something is not working or you need to confirm the repo is ready to query.
